infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Mirror AI uses the camera so you can capture a photo to try clothes on.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Mirror AI needs access to your photos so you can pick an image to try clothes on.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Mirror AI saves your try-on results to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Mirror AI uses your location to suggest outfits for the weather near you.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Mirror AI to use your camera to take a try-on photo.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Mirror AI to access your photos to pick a try-on image.
Allow Mirror AI to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Mirror AI saves your try-on results to your photo library.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Mirror AI uses your location to suggest outfits for the weather near you.
